project.title: mouse primary keratinocytes LC-MS
project.projectDescription: Proteins in supernatant from HIMRSA/HBSS-treated primary keratinocytes.
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: Supernatant from HIMRSA/HBSS-treated primary keratinocytes was collected and concentrated. Collected protein was subjected to SDS-PAGE and band with speficfic size were processed for LC-MS.
project.dataProcessingProtocol: The peptide/spectrum matches (PSMs) and area were evaluated for candidate choice. IL-24 protein sequence (UniProt ID: Q925S4) was searched against MS spectra. Specific peptide sequence “IVIMSQLQPSKDNSMLPISESAHQRFLL” (positions in protein: 121-146) was used to quantify abundance.

references.referenceLine: Qian X, Tong M, Zhang T, Li Q, Hua M, Zhou N, Zeng W. IL-24 promotes atopic dermatitis-like inflammation through driving MRSA-induced allergic responses. Protein Cell. 2025 16(3):188-210

identifiedPTMStrings.name: No PTMs are included in the dataset
